creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Apr 16 13:20:14 2014
New Revision: 351379
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351379
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351379/

Log:
  - Stage
  - Fix pkg-plist
  - Pet portlint
  
  PR:		ports/188672
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr@ (blanket)

Modified:
  head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/Makefile
  head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/Makefile	Wed Apr 16 11:46:15 2014	(r351378)
+++ head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/Makefile	Wed Apr 16 13:20:14 2014	(r351379)
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	SF/freebbs/${PORTNAME}-${P
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A replacement for the official Freenet Project's freenet_request
+COMMENT=	Replacement for the official Freenet Project's freenet_request
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYXML}
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
@@ -19,8 +19,7 @@ USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	FreenetGrab
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-install:
-	@${MV} ${PREFIX}/bin/fngrab.py ${PREFIX}/bin/fngrab
+	@${MV} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/fngrab.py ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/fngrab
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/pkg-plist	Wed Apr 16 11:46:15 2014	(r351378)
+++ head/net-p2p/py-fngrab/pkg-plist	Wed Apr 16 13:20:14 2014	(r351379)
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 bin/fngrab
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/FreenetGrab/setup.py
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/FreenetGrab/setup.pyc
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/FreenetGrab/setup.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/FreenetGrab/__init__.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/FreenetGrab/__init__.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/FreenetGrab/__init__.pyo
